hero.title: Patient Information
hero.subtitle: WELCOME TO OUR PRACTICE
hero.description: Everything you need to know about your visit to our dental practice.

insurance.title: Insurance & Payment
insurance.description: We accept most major insurance plans and offer flexible payment options.

steps.title: Paperwork
steps.description: Complete registration forms before your visit

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: Meet with your dentist to discuss concerns

items.title: Appointments
items.content: Please arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled appointment. 24-hour notice is required for cancellations.

items.title: Emergency Care
items.content: 24/7 emergency dental services available for existing patients.

items.title: Privacy
items.content: We maintain strict patient confidentiality in accordance with HIPAA regulations.

cta.title: Ready to Schedule Your Visit?
cta.description: We're here to make your dental experience as comfortable as possible.
